name_en: ❤️B's latest soft and structured tote bag, crafted from grained calfskin. Exquisitely made in an Italian workshop, featuring a suede lining. It incorporates the brand's iconic B-shaped closure, with smooth calfskin panels adorned with a horseback rider logo (EKD) embossing. Features a detachable shoulder strap for effortless switching between tote and shoulder bag styles. The back is decorated with a horseback rider logo (EKD) embossing. Dimensions: 35.5 × 18 × 28cm
